sentences.target: Je travaille dans une institution publique.

translations.fr: Je travaille dans une institution publique.
translations.en: I work in a public institution.
translations.de: Ich arbeite in einer öffentlichen Einrichtung.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在一家公共机构工作。
translations.yue: 我喺一間公共機構做嘢。
translations.vi: Tôi làm việc tại một cơ quan công lập.
translations.nl: Ik werk bij een publieke instelling.
translations.hi: मैं एक सार्वजनिक संस्था में काम करता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg jobber i en offentlig institusjon.
translations.id: Saya bekerja di sebuah lembaga publik.
translations.sv: Jag arbetar på en offentlig institution.
translations.da: Jeg arbejder i en offentlig institution.
translations.ja: 私は公的機関で働いています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; grammatical subject of the clause.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; expresses the action performed by the subject.
Preposition introducing a locative/complement, governing the noun phrase that follows.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'institution'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the prepositional object of 'dans'.
Qualifying adjective, feminine singular; post-nominal modifier agreeing with 'institution'.

sentences.target: Cette institution est connue dans le quartier.
sentences.reading: /sɛt ɛ̃s.ti.ty.sjɔ̃ ɛ kɔ.ny dɑ̃ lə kaʁ.tje/

translations.fr: Cette institution est connue dans le quartier.
translations.ipa: /sɛt ɛ̃s.ti.ty.sjɔ̃ ɛ kɔ.ny dɑ̃ lə kaʁ.tje/
translations.en: This institution is well known in the neighborhood.
translations.es: Esta institución es muy conocida en el barrio.
translations.de: Diese Einrichtung ist im Viertel bekannt.
translations.it: Questa istituzione è molto conosciuta nel quartiere.
translations.ko: 이 기관은 동네에서 잘 알려져 있습니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 这家机构在附近很有名。
translations.yue: 呢間機構喺呢個社區好出名。
translations.ru: Это учреждение хорошо известно в этом районе.
translations.pt: Esta instituição é muito conhecida no bairro.
translations.vi: Tổ chức này rất nổi tiếng trong khu phố.
translations.ar: هذه المؤسسة معروفة جدًا في الحي.
translations.nl: Deze instelling is erg bekend in de buurt.
translations.uk: Ця установа добре відома в цьому районі.
translations.hu: Ez az intézmény jól ismert a környéken.
translations.hi: यह संस्था इस पड़ोस में बहुत मशहूर है.
translations.pl: Ta instytucja jest dobrze znana w okolicy.
translations.el: Αυτός ο φορέας είναι πολύ γνωστός στη γειτονιά.
translations.nb: Denne institusjonen er godt kjent i nabolaget.
translations.id: Lembaga ini sangat dikenal di lingkungan.
translations.sv: Denna institution är välkänd i kvarteret.
translations.ro: Această instituție este bine cunoscută în cartier.
translations.cs: Tato instituce je v sousedství dobře známá.
translations.da: Denne institution er velkendt i nabolaget.
translations.fi: Tämä laitos on hyvin tunnettu naapurustossa.
translations.ja: この機関は近所でよく知られています。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; specifies the referent of 'institution'.
Common noun, feminine singular; grammatical subject of the clause.
Copula auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective (past participle used adjectivally), feminine singular; agrees with 'institution'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'quartier'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Tu fais confiance à cette institution.

translations.fr: Tu fais confiance à cette institution.
translations.vi: Bạn tin tưởng tổ chức này.
translations.hi: तुम इस संस्था पर भरोसा करते हो.
translations.sv: Du litar på den här institutionen.
translations.ja: あなたはこの機関を信頼しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; grammatical subject of the clause.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; part of the light-verb construction 'faire confiance' meaning 'to trust'.
Abstract noun; complement to 'faire' in the fixed expression 'faire confiance'.
Preposition marking the indirect object/beneficiary of 'faire confiance'.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'institution'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'à'.

translations.en: We are calling the institution this afternoon.
translations.es: Llamamos a la institución esta tarde.
translations.de: Wir rufen die Einrichtung heute Nachmittag an.
translations.ko: 우리는 오늘 오후에 그 기관에 전화합니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天下午给这家机构打电话。
translations.yue: 我哋今日下晝打電話俾呢間機構。
translations.ru: Мы позвоним в это учреждение сегодня днём.
translations.pt: Vamos ligar para a instituição esta tarde.
translations.he: אנחנו מתקשרים למוסד הזה אחר הצהריים.
translations.tr: Bugün öğleden sonra o kurumu arıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chiều nay chúng tôi sẽ gọi cho cơ quan đó.
translations.nl: We bellen vanmiddag naar de instelling.
translations.uk: Ми зателефонуємо до цієї установи сьогодні вдень.
translations.hi: हम आज दोपहर संस्था को फोन करेंगे.
translations.pl: Zadzwonimy do tej instytucji dziś po południu.
translations.el: Θα καλέσουμε τον φορέα αυτό το απόγευμα.
translations.id: Kami akan menelepon lembaga itu sore ini.
translations.ro: Sunăm la instituție în această după-amiază.
translations.cs: Zavoláme do té instituce dnes odpoledne.
translations.da: Vi ringer til institutionen i eftermiddag.
translations.ja: 私たちは今日の午後、その機関に電話します。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural; grammatical subject of the clause.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person plural; expresses the action performed by the subject.
Definite article elided before a vowel; introduces the direct object 'institution'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'appelons'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular used before vowel-initial nouns; modifies 'après-midi'.
Compound common noun; functions as a temporal complement (adverbial) indicating when the action occurs.
